Vendored static libraries (no Node build chain, per TECH_SPEC ADR-1):

- marked.min.js — marked v15.0.12, MIT. https://github.com/markedjs/marked
- purify.min.js — DOMPurify 3.2.6, Apache-2.0 OR MPL-2.0. https://github.com/cure53/DOMPurify

Update by replacing the files with a newer pinned release.
